nasb.text: But Gideon said to them, “I will not rule over you, nor shall my son rule over you; the Lord shall rule over you.”

esv.text: Gideon said to them, “I will not rule over you, and my son will not rule over you; the Lord will rule over you.”

cnv.text: 基甸回答他們：“我不統治你們，我的子孫也不統治你們，唯有耶和華統治你們。”

ccb.text: 基甸回答说：“我和我子孙都不统治你们，统治你们的是耶和华。
